reviews.author: Ananya R.
reviews.title: Smooth special darshan
reviews.text: Booked the special darshan slot in minutes and received an SMS instantly. The whole journey felt calm and well organised.

reviews.author: Marcus L.
reviews.title: Dream mountain trip
reviews.text: Jungfraujoch and Zermatt were unforgettable. The suggested stays and package format made planning effortless.

reviews.author: Sara K.
reviews.title: Temples and beaches
reviews.text: Loved Uluwatu at sunset and Ubud rice terraces. Booking felt trustworthy because payment stayed on hold until confirmation.

reviews.author: Harpreet S.
reviews.title: Peaceful and divine
reviews.text: The Golden Temple at dawn is beyond words. The langar experience touched my heart. Highly recommend a night visit too.

places.name: Meenakshi Amman Backstreets
places.note: The lanes around the temple have incredible flower markets and traditional filter coffee stalls. Go early morning.
places.author: Deepa V.

places.name: Hallstatt Lakeside
places.note: A fairytale alpine village on a mirror lake. Take the early train before the day crowds arrive.
places.author: Marcus L.
